name: Temple Moneychanger
oracleText: Whenever you create or sacrifice a Treasure, Temple Moneychanger deals 1 damage to any target and you gain 1 life.
flavorText: "My house shall be called the house of prayer." — Matthew 21:13
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; mechanics, colors, and art sourcing remain pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Rembrandt's "Christ Driving the Money-changers from the Temple" via Wikimedia Commons. First-pass mechanics added in this pass; mana, colors, and rules text remain provisional.

classics.license: Public domain; Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of the public-domain work.
classics.creditText: Rembrandt, Christ Driving the Money-changers from the Temple
classics.sourceNotes: The action, crowding, and temple setting are exactly on-theme for the moneychanger card.
